description: Epic but achievable same-day challenges with strict safety boundaries. Nightmare measures commitment, not danger.

challenges.title: One-Day Movement Mosaic
challenges.prompt: Across one day, complete four different 20-minute movement sessions suited to your current ability, with long breaks and at least one gentle recovery session.

challenges.title: Walk-and-Create Marathon
challenges.prompt: Take three separate safe 20-minute walks in one day and make one drawing, photo, or paragraph after each; never use a device while moving.

challenges.title: Epic Team Challenge Day
challenges.prompt: Organize a two-hour team event with six safe stations: walking relay, charades, puzzle, cup stack, drawing, and trivia; inspect the venue and make every station optional.

challenges.title: Three-Hour Marked-Trail Quest
challenges.prompt: Only if it matches the group's current ability, complete up to three hours on a legal marked route with capable companions, route sharing, weather checks, water, food, daylight margin, and a turn-back plan.

challenges.title: Two-Hour Protected Bike Quest
challenges.prompt: Experienced riders only: plan a legal protected or low-traffic route, wear helmets, carry repair basics and water, ride with a capable buddy, obey traffic law, and turn back for weather or fatigue.

challenges.title: Full Mobility Workshop
challenges.prompt: Complete three 20-minute sessions of gentle familiar mobility across one day, never bouncing or pushing into pain and stopping any movement that causes symptoms.

challenges.title: Same-Day Dance Build
challenges.prompt: Choose, learn, rehearse, and safely perform a three-minute dance before the day ends, using breaks and a clear practice space.

challenges.title: Full-Board Activity Bingo
challenges.prompt: Create a 4-by-4 board of short, safe, adaptable movement tasks and complete every square across one day with full rest as needed.

challenges.title: Buddy Distance Day
challenges.prompt: With a willing buddy, choose a cumulative walking distance appropriate to both current abilities and reach it across one day using safe routes, breaks, and a turn-back option.

challenges.title: Design an Accessible Workout Game
challenges.prompt: Create, test, and document a 30-minute movement game with seated, low-impact, and higher-energy options; get feedback from willing testers.

challenges.title: Seven-Episode Micro-Series Day
challenges.prompt: Write, shoot, and edit seven connected 20-second original episodes in one day; every filmed person controls whether and where footage is shared.

challenges.title: Ten-Minute Stage Show
challenges.prompt: Create and perform a ten-minute clean variety show containing at least three original segments for an audience that opted in.

challenges.title: Illustrated Book in a Day
challenges.prompt: Write, illustrate, revise, and assemble an original story of at least ten short pages before the day ends.

challenges.title: Cardboard City in a Day
challenges.prompt: Design and build a tabletop cardboard city with at least ten structures in one day using age-appropriate tools, then clear the workspace.

challenges.title: Three-Song Demo Day
challenges.prompt: Write and record three short original song demos in one day using only sounds you created or may legally use.

challenges.title: Photo Alphabet Day
challenges.prompt: Create 26 original photos representing A through Z in one day without trespassing or including unconsented people or private information.

challenges.title: Stop-Motion Feature Day
challenges.prompt: Plan and produce three minutes of stop-motion animation in one day using a clear workspace, an original story, and legally usable audio.

challenges.title: Board Game in a Day
challenges.prompt: Design, prototype, play-test, revise, and document an original tabletop game before the day ends using safe materials and willing testers.

challenges.title: Room-Sized Art Installation
challenges.prompt: With property-owner permission, create a temporary walk-safe art installation, invite willing viewers, then remove it completely and restore the space.

challenges.title: Mini Documentary Day
challenges.prompt: Research, record, and edit a five-minute documentary about a harmless local topic in one day using verified facts and explicit recording and location permission.

challenges.title: Ask and Plan a Respectful Date
challenges.prompt: Privately ask an age-appropriate person you already know on a specific public date, accept any answer immediately, and—only after a clear yes—plan details that respect both people's boundaries, budget, transport, and schedule.

challenges.title: Host a Five-Person Gathering
challenges.prompt: Invite at least five people you know to a two-hour inclusive activity with clear details, an easy decline, accessible options, and no surprise costs or recording.

challenges.title: Five-Person Reconnection Day
challenges.prompt: Send individualized, no-pressure messages to five trusted friends or relatives in one day; do not chase replies or contact anyone who asked for space.

challenges.title: Community Event Courage
challenges.prompt: Attend a legitimate public class, club, or volunteer event with a buddy, participate appropriately, and introduce yourself to three peers while respecting disengagement cues.

challenges.title: Open-Mic Original
challenges.prompt: With guardian approval where needed, register for a legitimate all-ages or age-appropriate open mic and perform an original clean piece; follow venue rules and never record others without permission.

challenges.title: Plan a Surprise That Is Not a Trap
challenges.prompt: Create a positive surprise for someone you know while confirming their boundaries through a trusted person; no public spectacle, fear, deception about emergencies, unwanted guests, or forced recording.

challenges.title: Seven Honest Conversations Day
challenges.prompt: Have seven short, respectful conversations with people you already know in one day, listening more than you speak and avoiding pressured personal topics.

challenges.title: Create a Friend-Group Time Capsule
challenges.prompt: With willing friends, collect copies of non-sensitive notes or art, agree on storage and an opening date, and let every contributor remove their item at any time.

challenges.title: Run a Consent-First Game Night
challenges.prompt: Host a game night where rules, photos, food, teams, and participation are opt-in; provide quiet alternatives and allow anyone to leave without explanation.

challenges.title: Five Positive Stories
challenges.prompt: Ask five willing people you know one open question about a positive memory or interest and keep every answer private unless they permit sharing.

challenges.title: Seven-Act Kindness Day
challenges.prompt: Complete seven small, consent-respecting acts of service or appreciation in one day without filming recipients or demanding recognition.

challenges.title: Volunteer Project Shift
challenges.prompt: Complete a half-day project through a reputable organization, including required orientation, guardian approval, protective equipment, and confidentiality.

challenges.title: Same-Day Donation Sprint
challenges.prompt: After confirming a legitimate organization's current needs, collect appropriate clean items from willing household members and deliver them the same day with venue and guardian permission where required.

challenges.title: Free Resource Website Day
challenges.prompt: Build a simple accessible site listing verified free community resources in one day using official public information, a date checked, and no user-data collection.

challenges.title: Neighborhood Cleanup Team
challenges.prompt: Join or obtain permission for a group cleanup, brief everyone on traffic and hazardous-waste avoidance, use protective gear, and dispose of ordinary litter correctly.

challenges.title: Three Safe Repairs Day
challenges.prompt: Safely mend three low-risk personal items in one day with proper tools; exclude electrical, gas, vehicle, structural, medical, and protective equipment.

challenges.title: Cook a Family Meal Event
challenges.prompt: With kitchen and household permission, plan, budget, cook, serve, and clean up a full meal for willing guests while managing allergies, cross-contamination, appliance safety, and supervision.

challenges.title: Language Immersion Day
challenges.prompt: Complete four separated 45-minute language sessions in one day covering listening, speaking, reading, and writing, with normal meals and breaks.

challenges.title: Build and Explain an App Today
challenges.prompt: Create a small original application in one day with local data or an API, tests for its core behavior, setup instructions, and a three-minute demo.

challenges.title: Learn a Full Routine Today
challenges.prompt: Learn a complete safe beginner routine in juggling, magic, drawing, music, or another low-risk skill and perform it for willing friends before the day ends.

challenges.title: Read-and-Teach Day
challenges.prompt: Read a short nonfiction book or 150 pages in one day with breaks, verify three claims using reputable sources, and teach a five-minute summary to a willing listener.

challenges.title: Hundred-Piece Maker Day
challenges.prompt: Create one object or artwork involving at least 100 safe assembled pieces before the day ends, documenting the design and cleaning afterward.

challenges.title: Local History Deep Dive
challenges.prompt: Using official archives, libraries, or museums, research a local place and produce a sourced two-page story in one day without entering restricted sites or exposing private addresses.

challenges.title: One-Day Digital Reset
challenges.prompt: Back up important files, then complete four focused digital-organization blocks on only your own data; never delete school, work, finance, health, legal, or safety records.

challenges.title: Finish-One-Project Day
challenges.prompt: Choose one safe unfinished personal project, define a realistic done state, and complete several focused blocks before the day ends without expanding scope.

challenges.title: Personal Space Overhaul Day
challenges.prompt: Plan and complete a full reset of your own room in one day while preserving documents, medication, valuables, emergency access, and other people's belongings.

challenges.title: Full-Day Optional-Feed Break
challenges.prompt: Avoid optional algorithmic social feeds for one day while keeping necessary communication, accessibility tools, maps, school or work access, news alerts, and emergency services.

challenges.title: Full-Day Sleep-Protecting Reset
challenges.prompt: Keep optional screens out of the first and last hour of your normal waking day without waking early, delaying bedtime, or losing access to necessary communication.

challenges.title: Seven Creative Blocks Today
challenges.prompt: Complete seven separate 20-minute creative blocks before the day ends, taking real breaks and never sacrificing meals, responsibilities, or sleep.

challenges.title: Design Fifty Challenges Today
challenges.prompt: Write 50 original, legal, consent-respecting, same-day challenge ideas and safety-review every one against the project's prohibited-content policy.

challenges.title: Airport Arrivals Adventure
challenges.prompt: With a capable buddy, normal transport budget, and guardian approval where needed, visit a local airport's publicly accessible arrivals area, get a snack or observe the public board, and return the same day; no restricted areas, security filming, unattended bags, pranks, or staff interference.

challenges.title: Five-Stop Transit Quest
challenges.prompt: With a buddy, use official schedules to visit five safe public transit stops tied to legal public places and return before service ends; pay fares and keep a backup route.

challenges.title: The Honest Crush Message
challenges.prompt: Privately text an age-appropriate person you already know: 'I like you and would enjoy taking you out sometime. No pressure at all—would you be interested?' Send it once and treat yes, no, uncertainty, or silence with equal respect.

challenges.title: Five Brave Invitations
challenges.prompt: Individually invite five people you already know to one specific public group hangout, personalize each message, include full details, and never follow up after no response.

challenges.title: Embarrassingly Sincere Voice Note
challenges.prompt: Send a trusted friend or partner who enjoys voice notes a 45-second dramatic speech about why they are excellent; no public posting and no demand for a reply.

challenges.title: Formalwear Ordinary Errand
challenges.prompt: Wear comfortable formal clothes you already own while completing one ordinary public errand, provided the outfit suits weather, mobility, venue rules, and cultural context.

challenges.title: Private-Room Karaoke Set
challenges.prompt: Book or use a lawful private karaoke room and perform five full songs for willing friends; follow age, cost, volume, recording, and venue rules.

challenges.title: Airport Code Bingo
challenges.prompt: From official public airport information at home or in a public terminal area, find 20 different airport codes and correctly identify their cities; do not enter restricted areas or disrupt travelers.

challenges.title: Local City Tour Day
challenges.prompt: Plan and complete a same-day tour of five legal public local attractions with a buddy, agreed budget, official opening hours, transport plan, and safe route home.

challenges.title: Longest Comfortable Walk
challenges.prompt: If it matches your current ability, complete up to a 2.5-hour walk on a familiar legal route with a buddy, water, weather checks, breaks, and permission to turn back early.

challenges.title: Protected Bike Expedition
challenges.prompt: Experienced riders only: complete up to two hours on a planned legal protected or low-traffic route with helmets, water, repair basics, weather checks, and a capable buddy.

challenges.title: Full-Spectrum Workout
challenges.prompt: If appropriate for your current ability, warm up, complete six different familiar eight-minute movement blocks with generous breaks, then cool down; stop for pain or unusual symptoms.

challenges.title: All-Day Group Tournament
challenges.prompt: Design and host a same-day tournament with at least six safe games, balanced teams, breaks, accessible alternatives, and no elimination from the social event.

challenges.title: Creative Project Sunrise-to-Sunset
challenges.prompt: During normal waking hours, complete an original film, zine, game, song collection, or art piece using planned work blocks, meals, movement breaks, and a firm bedtime cutoff.

challenges.title: Hundred-Item Personal Sort
challenges.prompt: Sort 100 items you own into keep, repair, relocate, recycle, and donate groups without discarding documents, medication, valuables, or anyone else's belongings.

challenges.title: Household Feast Challenge
challenges.prompt: With permission and suitable supervision, plan, cook, serve, and clean up a multi-dish meal for willing guests while managing allergies, cross-contamination, appliances, and budget.

challenges.title: Legitimate Volunteer Shift
challenges.prompt: Complete a pre-arranged same-day shift with a reputable organization, following all age, guardian, training, protective-equipment, and confidentiality requirements.

challenges.title: Inbox Zero-ish Day
challenges.prompt: Process a large but realistic batch of your own messages and files in timed blocks, backing up important data and preserving all legal, health, school, work, and financial records.

challenges.title: Necessary-Phone-Only Day
challenges.prompt: For one day, use your phone only for necessary communication, accessibility, navigation, tickets, school, work, photos for this challenge, and emergencies.

challenges.title: Finish a Short Book Today
challenges.prompt: Read a short book or up to 200 pages in one day with normal meals, posture changes, eye breaks, responsibilities, and sleep protected.

challenges.title: Thirty Original Memes
challenges.prompt: Create 30 clean original memes in one day using your own or public-domain images, then privately send only the best three to a willing friend.

challenges.title: Family Awards Ceremony
challenges.prompt: Create and host a ten-minute sincere and funny awards ceremony for willing family members, avoiding sensitive traits and letting everyone opt out of photos.

challenges.title: Recreate a Family Photo
challenges.prompt: With every person's permission, safely recreate one old family photo using comfortable poses and private-by-default sharing.

challenges.title: Museum Detail Quest
challenges.prompt: Visit a legitimate museum or gallery and find 25 details matching a list you wrote, following admission, photography, noise, and exhibit rules.

challenges.title: Twenty-Challenge Party
challenges.prompt: Design and run 20 short, safe, optional mini-challenges for willing friends in one day, including seated alternatives and no forced messages, posting, food, touch, disclosure, or exercise.

challenges.title: Hundred Push-Up Points in Ten Sets
challenges.prompt: Only if push-ups suit your current fitness, complete up to ten sets of ten across one day. Wall, countertop, knee, and standard versions count equally; warm up, use clean form, rest generously, and stop early for pain or unusual symptoms.

challenges.title: Two-Hundred Movement-Point Day
challenges.prompt: Earn 200 points across one day using at least ten safe familiar movements, capping every movement at 20 points and splitting work into small sessions with meals, water, and long breaks.

challenges.title: Hundred Supported Squat Points
challenges.prompt: If appropriate for your ability, accumulate up to 100 controlled chair sit-to-stands or supported squats in sets of ten or fewer across one day; stop before fatigue changes form.

challenges.title: Five-Kilometer Costume Walk
challenges.prompt: If that distance is already reasonable for you, walk up to five kilometers on a familiar legal route with a buddy while wearing one comfortable silly accessory; check weather and turn back early for symptoms.

challenges.title: Ten-Thousand-Step Option
challenges.prompt: Only if near your normal ability, reach up to 10,000 total steps in one day through several safe walks; normal daily steps count, and health needs, pain, weather, or responsibilities end the challenge early.

challenges.title: Eight-Block Dance Day
challenges.prompt: Complete eight separate ten-minute dance blocks across one day in a clear space, with long breaks and lower-impact substitutions whenever needed.

challenges.title: Anime Main-Character Day
challenges.prompt: Wear an appropriate, comfortable anime-inspired outfit during normal waking activities for one day; no masks, prop weapons, revealing costume requirements, impersonation, blocked senses, or rule violations.

challenges.title: Convention Quest Card
challenges.prompt: At a legitimate anime or fan convention you are already attending, complete ten venue-approved quests such as visiting artist booths, attending panels, and asking consenting cosplayers for photos; follow badges, lines, photography, and prop rules.

challenges.title: Five-Episode Anime Jury
challenges.prompt: Watch five age-appropriate legally available episodes from different series in one day with breaks, then create a spoiler-free scorecard for animation, music, characters, and opening hook.

challenges.title: Full Anime Opening Production
challenges.prompt: Write, costume, shoot, and edit a 90-second original anime-opening parody in one day using permitted locations, legally usable audio, and only participants who agree to filming and sharing.

challenges.title: Airport Day Quest
challenges.prompt: With a buddy, approved budget, official transport plan, and guardian approval where needed, go to a local airport's public passenger area, complete a legal observation checklist, eat or browse if desired, and return the same day; obey every posted rule.

challenges.title: Airport Transit Loop
challenges.prompt: With a buddy, use public transit to reach a local airport, transfer to a different legal public route, and return home before service ends; pay fares and never enter staff, baggage, runway, or security-only areas.

challenges.title: Airport Character Trio
challenges.prompt: With two willing friends, visit an airport's public area dressed as three comfortable original travel characters, take photos only of your group in allowed spots, and leave without disrupting travelers or staff.

challenges.title: Sing Only After Permission
challenges.prompt: At a suitable public social event, ask one adult peer for their favorite song, then ask whether they want to hear ten seconds sung quietly. Sing only after a clear yes, stop immediately if asked, and never film without separate consent.

challenges.title: Three Consent-First Event Photos
challenges.prompt: At a public social event, take three funny photos with three different willing adult peers. Ask before each photo, avoid unwanted touch, and get separate permission before keeping or posting identifiable images.

challenges.title: Party Dance Invitation
challenges.prompt: At a legitimate party or dance venue, ask one peer already near the dance area if they want to join your group's 30-second silly dance; accept no instantly and keep paths clear.

challenges.title: Booked-Room Party Sprint
challenges.prompt: Plan and host a two-hour party in a home or legal booked room with willing guests, a real end time, safe volume, no restroom games, no blocked exits, and no surprise recording.

challenges.title: Bathroom-Mirror Music Video
challenges.prompt: At home in a dry private bathroom, create a two-minute solo mirror music video using original or legally usable audio; never climb fixtures, add water, involve strangers, or film anyone using the room.

challenges.title: Five Trusted Voice Notes
challenges.prompt: Send five different trusted people who normally enjoy voice messages five different 20-second character performances; label each as today's challenge and never follow up for reactions.

challenges.title: Group-Chat Meme Tournament
challenges.prompt: With group-chat agreement, create an eight-entry clean meme bracket using original or public-domain images and let willing members vote without tagging or pressuring silent members.

challenges.title: Ask-Out Meme Combo
challenges.prompt: Send an age-appropriate person you already know a clean shared-interest meme, then one direct message asking whether they would like a public date or hangout; send nothing further unless they respond.

challenges.title: Private Partner Serenade
challenges.prompt: Ask a partner or romantic interest who welcomes this kind of attention whether they want a one-minute private silly serenade; perform only after yes and never record or post without separate permission.

challenges.title: Cosplay Public Outing
challenges.prompt: Wear a venue-appropriate cosplay during one legal public outing with a buddy; comply with mask and prop rules, keep full mobility and visibility, and ask before photographing or touching anyone.

challenges.title: Costume Transit Quest
challenges.prompt: With a buddy, wear comfortable original-character outfits while completing a planned public-transit loop; no masks, props, impersonation, blocking, filming strangers, or failure to pay fares.

challenges.title: Ten-Landmark Character Album
challenges.prompt: With a buddy, photograph only yourselves in one original character pose at ten legal public landmarks in one day; stay on permitted surfaces and keep bystanders out of frame.

challenges.title: Five-Park Local Quest
challenges.prompt: Visit five legal local parks or public green spaces with a buddy in one day using a planned route, weather checks, daylight margin, and leave-no-trace behavior.

challenges.title: Hundred-Item Photo Hunt
challenges.prompt: With a buddy, find and photograph 100 ordinary objects from a prepared list in legal public or private-with-permission places; exclude people, addresses, restricted areas, and anything unsafe to approach.

challenges.title: Ten-Minute Comedy Show
challenges.prompt: Write, rehearse, and perform ten minutes of clean original comedy for a willing audience without targeting identity, bodies, trauma, secrets, or people who cannot respond.

challenges.title: Ten-Song Karaoke Set
challenges.prompt: Perform ten suitable songs across a legal karaoke session with willing friends, taking breaks, protecting your voice, and following venue, recording, age, and volume rules.

challenges.title: Approved Five-Minute Dance
challenges.prompt: Rehearse and perform a five-minute routine in a booked studio, private room, registered event, or venue-approved performance space without blocking or surprising the public.

challenges.title: Venue-Approved Mini Flash Mob
challenges.prompt: With at least five willing performers and written or clear venue permission, stage a one-minute routine in a designated area; preserve exits, do not surround bystanders, and film only participants who agreed.

challenges.title: Same-Day Talent Show
challenges.prompt: Recruit willing friends, prepare a running order, and host a 30-minute talent show with safe acts, opt-outs, accessibility options, and permission rules for every recording.

challenges.title: Fifty Funny Self-Portraits
challenges.prompt: Create 50 different funny self-portraits in one day using only safe poses and props; do not photograph anyone else and never climb for an angle.

challenges.title: Hundred Meme Captions
challenges.prompt: Write 100 clean original meme captions for your own or public-domain images in one day, then privately share only the best five with a willing friend.

challenges.title: Approved Mystery-Basket Meal
challenges.prompt: Let a household member choose five normal compatible ingredients from a pre-approved allergy-safe list, then create a proper cooked meal with permission, hygiene, safe temperatures, and suitable supervision.

challenges.title: Safe Snack Roulette Wheel
challenges.prompt: Create a wheel of ten ordinary foods you already eat safely, spin three times, and assemble a tiny snack plate; never include allergens, raw-risk foods, chemicals, medicines, extreme spice, or anything spoiled, and do not force a bite.

challenges.title: Weird-but-Normal Taste Board
challenges.prompt: Arrange six safe familiar foods into three unusual but reasonable pairings, taste only tiny portions you choose, and stop at any sign of allergy, spoilage, or discomfort.

challenges.title: Twenty Character Pancakes
challenges.prompt: With kitchen permission and suitable supervision, make up to 20 small pancakes shaped like original cartoon faces while following allergy, heat, and food-hygiene rules.

challenges.title: All-Day Original Character
challenges.prompt: Around consenting friends and during appropriate public activities, stay dressed as one harmless original character for normal waking hours; break character for staff, safety, serious topics, and anyone not participating.

challenges.title: Airport-Library-Park Triangle
challenges.prompt: With a buddy and a realistic local route, visit a public airport passenger area, a library, and a park in one day, completing one legal observation task at each and returning before transport or daylight limits.

challenges.title: Same-Day Local Mystery Trip
challenges.prompt: With a willing buddy, plan a same-day trip to three legal public destinations using transit or a properly licensed, rested driver; agree on budget, route, boundaries, and return time before leaving.

challenges.title: Five-Friend Appreciation Broadcast
challenges.prompt: Send five trusted friends individualized 30-second private voice messages explaining one specific thing you appreciate; no group blast, public post, or expectation of reply.

challenges.title: Seven-Minute Family Lesson
challenges.prompt: Prepare and teach a willing family audience a seven-minute lesson on a harmless topic using props, one quiz question, and a ridiculous professor voice.

challenges.title: Five Non-Body Compliments
challenges.prompt: Across a suitable public social event, give five brief compliments about choices, skills, or contributions; do not target appearance or bodies, follow anyone, record, or continue after a short response.

challenges.title: Five-Location Costume Scavenger Hunt
challenges.prompt: With a buddy, complete a 25-item scavenger list across five legal public locations while wearing comfortable harmless accessories; keep costumes identifiable and bystanders out of photos.

challenges.title: Five-Hour Planned Public Adventure
challenges.prompt: With a buddy, complete a five-hour local itinerary of legal public activities with scheduled meals, water, rest, weather checks, a budget, and a reliable route home.

challenges.title: Five-Hundred Push-Up Movie Magic
challenges.prompt: Record ten controlled wall push-ups that fit your ability, then edit the clip to loop 50 times so it looks like 500; label it clearly as movie magic and never actually attempt 500 repetitions.

challenges.title: Upside-Down Ceiling Push-Up Movie
challenges.prompt: Create a camera-rotation illusion while lying safely on a clear floor so it appears you are doing ceiling push-ups; never invert, climb, hang, or support weight overhead.

challenges.title: Side-Wall Push-Up Movie
challenges.prompt: Film five normal wall push-ups with the camera rotated so the wall appears to be the floor; use safe form, a stable wall, and a private or permitted filming place.

challenges.title: Private Bathroom Party Replacement
challenges.prompt: At home, turn a dry private bathroom mirror into a solo two-song concert, then immediately restore the room; no guests, public restrooms, blocked doors, water, climbing, or filming anyone else.

challenges.title: Twenty-Persona Voice Reel
challenges.prompt: Record 20 five-second original character voices in one private audio reel, avoiding imitation of protected identities or real people used to deceive.

challenges.title: Full-Day Ridiculous Documentary
challenges.prompt: Document your normal day as if you are the hero of an epic quest using only staged shots of yourself, consenting household members, and legal locations; protect private information and sleep.
